MADE_OF_GOLD.title: Made of Gold
MADE_OF_GOLD.description: Whenever this creature is dealt unblocked attack damage and survives, attacker gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
MADE_OF_GOLD.smartDescription: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is dealt unblocked attack damage and survives, attacker gains [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
